childNodes.textContent:
Kitsoki mesa-sun favicon, inlined as a data URI: the SPA is built as a
         single go:embed'd file (vite-plugin-singlefile), so an external
         /favicon.svg reference would not be served. Source of truth:
         docs/branding/assets/mesa-sun-simple.svg (the small-size glyph).

Kitsoki "Mesa Sun" mark (docs/branding/logo.md, mesa-sun-simple.svg).
         Inlined as an SVG data URI so it survives vite-plugin-singlefile's
         single-file bundle and ships inside index.html — the Go web server
         (internal/runstatus/server) only routes "/" and "/rpc/*", so an
         external /favicon.svg would 404.

attributes.title: Draft Onboarding Profile With LLM → core.init_profile_draft (forward)

attributes.style: border-color: rgb(20, 184, 166); color: rgb(20, 184, 166); background: color-mix(in srgb, #14B8A6 8%, var(--k-paper-bg, #f6f7f9));

node.textContent: Review the project profile Kitsoki discovered. Accepting writes the local Kitsoki config, project profile, and story instance into the target checkout; feedback is recorded before another discovery pass.

- setup (dev-story:onboarding): Onboard the checkout, install project-local Kitsoki tooling, and run explicit readiness checks.
- bugfix (bugfix): Drive a picked bug through reproduce, fix, test, review, and validation gates.
- repo-bakeoff (repo-bakeoff): Turn historical bug fixes into capsule records, prove RED/GREEN arming, and render live-cell commands.
- pr-refinement (pr-refinement): Open or attach to a PR, monitor CI/review feedback, respond, and merge when accepted.
- git-ops (git-ops): Use the guarded git command hub for status, worktrees, commits, rebases, sync, and integration.
Seed project customization from recent associated transcripts after operator consent.

- claude-code: 2.000000 sessions at /Users/brad/.claude/projects/-Users-brad-code-gears-rust
- codex: 103.000000 sessions at /Users/brad/.codex/sessions
Type feedback in your own words to revise the draft, or use an action below.
